overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage depicting an ancient waterfront city at night. The sequence begins with a slow boat ride past torch-lit docks with classical statues, then transitions to ascending a grand ceremonial staircase flanked by marble figures and burning braziers.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient harbor waterfront with ceremonial boat

entered.detail: ancient wooden boat with distinctive fan-shaped stern decoration and furled sail
elevated stone waterfront platform with steps leading down to the water
lit fire bowls on tall stone pedestals lining the dock edge
white marble classical statues standing on the dock platform
large stone buildings with columns and ancient architecture in the background

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly along the water at night, tracking a ceremonial boat with an ornate fan-shaped stern. The stone dock on the left is lined with burning braziers and white marble statues, while ancient buildings rise in the background under a cloudy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial temple staircase with flanking statues

events.description: hard cut from waterfront boat scene to grand temple staircase

agents.ego_description: walking up the wide stone stairs, passing between large classical statues on each level

entered.detail: wide marble staircase with multiple ascending levels and geometric patterns
tall marble female statues holding vessels, positioned on stair landings
tall marble female statues holding vessels, positioned on stair landings
lit fire bowls on short pedestals flanking the staircase
tall pointed stone obelisks visible at the summit of the stairs

segments.scene_description: Following a transition from the waterfront, the camera ascends a grand ceremonial staircase flanked by massive marble statues and burning braziers. The stone steps lead upward toward temple buildings and obelisks visible against the night sky, with the camera moving steadily between the imposing statues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a slow glide along a torch-lit waterfront to a steady ascent up a grand ceremonial staircase. It begins by tracking a ceremonial boat with an ornate fan-shaped stern, moving past a stone dock lined with burning braziers and white marble statues under a cloudy night sky. As the camera leaves the water, the perspective shifts upward to climb a series of massive stone steps flanked by imposing marble figures and flickering flames. The scene then expands to reveal temple buildings and towering obelisks silhouetted against the darkness before finally reaching the heights of the ceremonial plaza.
